character.bio: A sumo wrestler looking to bring the sport worldwide, E. Honda has the skills of a yokozuna, but his constant globetrotting has prevented his promotion. Also an expert chef renowned for mouthwatering chanko stew.

ehonda_standing_medium_punch_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

ehonda_standing_medium_kick_m.note: * Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter if the opponent is standing on the groundForces a juggle state on Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponentCan be canceled up until the 3rd active frame*Can be canceled by Hundred Hand Slap from frames 8 - 14 if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_crouching_light_kick_l.note: Can be rapid canceled* Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda_crouching_medium_kick_m.note: * Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Adds +2 frames of recovery on armor hit or if the attack misses* Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

ehonda_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_harai_kick_h.note: Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter

ehonda_power_stomp_h.note: Produces a ground bound and hard knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent* Can cancel into a special move or Super Art on frame 15 when the attack misses

ehonda_toko_shizume.note: Produces a ground bound and hard knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent* Can cancel into a special move or Super Art on frame 14 when the attack misses* Can only be canceled into Sumo Spirit on hitClassic controls: ↓+Punch, Modern controls: ↓+Attack

ehonda_l_hundred_hand_slap_l.context: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state)
ehonda_l_hundred_hand_slap_l.input: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state) ↓↙← + LP
ehonda_l_hundred_hand_slap_l.note: Only the last hit can be canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_sumo_spirit_l_hundred_hand_slap_l.note: Only the last hit can be canceledOnly transitions into the final hit if the 2nd hit connectsForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_m_hundred_hand_slap_m.context: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state)
ehonda_m_hundred_hand_slap_m.input: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state) ↓↙← + MP
ehonda_m_hundred_hand_slap_m.note: Only the last hit can be canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_sumo_spirit_m_hundred_hand_slap_m.note: Only the last hit can be canceledOnly transitions into the final hit if the 5th hit connectsForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_h_hundred_hand_slap_h.context: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state)
ehonda_h_hundred_hand_slap_h.input: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state) ↓↙← + HP
ehonda_h_hundred_hand_slap_h.note: Only the last hit can be canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_sumo_spirit_h_hundred_hand_slap_h.note: Only the last hit can be canceledOnly transitions into the final hit if the 8th hit connectsForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_od_hundred_hand_slap.context: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state)
ehonda_od_hundred_hand_slap.input: (Effect changes when in Sumo Spirit state) ↓↙← + P
ehonda_od_hundred_hand_slap.note: Only the last hit can be canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_sumo_spirit_od_hundred_hand_slap.note: Only the last hit can be canceledOnly transitions into the final hit if the 5th hit connectsForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda_l_sumo_headbutt_l.note: Can be canceled until the 4th active frameInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 4 - 13Considered airborne from frames 14 - 33Does 1000 damage after the 5th active frame

ehonda_m_sumo_headbutt_m.note: Can be canceled until the 4th active frameInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 13Considered airborne from frames 14 - 35Does 1100 damage after the 5th active frame

ehonda_h_sumo_headbutt_h.note: Can be canceled until the 4th active frameInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 16Considered airborne from frames 18 - 40Does 1300 damage after the 5th active frameIf Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 19th frame, transitions into ending animation action

ehonda_od_sumo_headbutt.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from the 1st frame until the end of the active framesIf Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 27th frame, transitions into ending animation actionConsidered airborne from frame 14Always in Punish Counter state during execution.

ehonda_l_sumo_smash_l.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 48Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

ehonda_m_sumo_smash_m.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 45Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

ehonda_h_sumo_smash_h.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 42Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

ehonda_od_sumo_smash.note: Has cross-up attack propertiesInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 17Invincible to throws from frames 5 - 13Considered airborne from frames 5 - 39Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

ehonda_l_oicho_throw.note: Damage set to 2300 on Punish Counter

ehonda_m_oicho_throw.note: Damage set to 2645 on Punish Counter

ehonda_h_oicho_throw.note: With Classic ControlsDoes 2760 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2208 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

ehonda_od_oicho_throw.note: With Classic ControlsDoes 3220 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2576 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

ehonda_sumo_dash.note: Can transition to Taiho Cannon Lift or Teppo Triple Slap from frames 14 - 43

ehonda_od_sumo_dash.note: Can transition to Teppo Triple Slap from frames 13 - 27Can transition to Taiho Cannon Lift from frames 11 - 27

ehonda_teppo_triple_slap_1.note: Can transition to the final attack on the 34th frame on either hit or block.

ehonda_od_teppo_triple_slap_1.note: Can transition to the final attack on the 33th frame on either hit or block.

ehonda_taiho_cannon_lift.note: On hit, recovery is 15 frames and the total attack is 49 frames

ehonda_od_taiho_cannon_lift.note: On hit, recovery is 15 frames and the total attack is 49 frames

ehonda_neko_damashi.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)* Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda_sumo_spirit.note: Stocks Sumo Spirit on frame 51Changes the properties of the next Hundred Hand Slap performed

ehonda_sa1_show_of_force.note: Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

ehonda_sa2_ultimate_killer_head_ram.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 18Invincible to projectiles from frames 19 - 36Transitions to hand slaps if the second hit of the headbutt connectsTransitions again during the last hit of the hand slapsMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterIf Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 24th frame, transitions into ending animation action

ehonda_sa3_the_final_bout.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
ehonda_sa3_the_final_bout.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
ehonda_sa3_the_final_bout.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%* Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

ehonda_ca_the_final_bout.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
ehonda_ca_the_final_bout.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + P
ehonda_ca_the_final_bout.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%* Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

ehonda_saba_ori.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

ehonda_tawara_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

ehonda_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

ehonda_drive_impact_sumo_crunch.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

ehonda_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
ehonda_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
ehonda_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

ehonda_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

ehonda_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
ehonda_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
ehonda_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

ehonda_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

ehonda_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

ehonda_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

ehonda_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
ehonda_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
ehonda_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
